feature: Secure Inference Provider Registry and Encrypted Secrets Vault
description: Fix three security gaps: plaintext secrets in SQLite, API keys embedded in inference provider records, frontier providers not first-class. Adds AES-256-GCM vault, Zeroizing<String> key material, SecretRef references, Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini as registered providers, fallback chains, and model aliases. SpacetimeDB stores references not values.

tasks.name: VaultStore with AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt and vault.key generation
tasks.description: Add aes-gcm and zeroize to hex-nexus/Cargo.toml and hex-core/Cargo.toml. Create hex-nexus/src/vault.rs: VaultStore struct with vault_set(key: &str, value: &str) -> Result<()> and vault_get(key: &str) -> Result<Zeroizing<String>>. Encryption key derived from ~/.hex/vault.key (generated with OsRng, chmod 0600 on create). Encrypt: random 12-byte nonce + AES-256-GCM, store as base64(nonce):base64(ciphertext) in the existing HexFlo memory backend (key prefixed 'vault:'). Unit tests: round-trip encrypt/decrypt, vault.key created on first use, second call reuses existing key. Done when: cargo check -p hex-nexus passes, unit tests pass.

tasks.name: SecretRef enum with resolve() and ZeroizeOnDrop in hex-core
tasks.description: Create hex-core/src/secret_ref.rs: enum SecretRef { EnvVar(String), VaultKey(String) }. Implement SecretRef::resolve(&self) -> Result<Zeroizing<String>>: EnvVar reads std::env::var, VaultKey calls vault_get via IVaultPort trait (define trait in hex-core, implement in hex-nexus to avoid circular dep). Implement Display as 'env:NAME' or 'vault:KEY' — never the raw value. Implement FromStr to parse both prefixed formats. Update SecretGrant in hex-core (if it exists) to use secret_ref: SecretRef. Export from hex-core/src/lib.rs. Done when: cargo check -p hex-core passes, Display never shows raw values.

tasks.name: Vault routes: encrypt on set, mask on get, HMAC-authenticated single-use claim endpoint
tasks.description: Update hex-nexus/src/routes/ secrets handling. POST /api/secrets/vault: accepts {key, value}, calls vault_set — encrypted before storage. GET /api/secrets/vault/:key: calls vault_get, returns {key, value: '[encrypted]'} — never raw value. POST /api/secrets/vault/claim: validate HMAC-SHA256 token (grant_id+agent_id+nonce signed with HEX_HUB_SECRET), call vault_get once, mark grant claimed in SpacetimeDB via state port, return {value: decrypted}. Second claim on same grant_id returns 409. Expired grant returns 410. Done when: cargo check passes, claim endpoint tested with valid + replayed HMAC.

tasks.name: Inference provider schema: key_ref replaces key_value, raw values rejected at API boundary
tasks.description: Update hex-nexus/src/routes/inference.rs. In provider registration handler: rename secret_key field to key_ref in the request body struct. Add validation: if key_ref is Some and does NOT start with 'env:' or 'vault:', return HTTP 400 'Use --key-ref env:VAR_NAME or vault:KEY_ID, not raw values'. Update storage to persist key_ref string. On nexus startup scan existing inference_provider records for key_ref values lacking the prefix — log a warning per entry. Update discover_openrouter handler to store key_ref: 'env:OPENROUTER_API_KEY' not the raw key value. Done when: registration with raw value returns 400, valid key_ref stores correctly.

tasks.name: Secrets CLI: encrypted set/get display, migrate and export subcommands
tasks.description: Update hex-cli/src/commands/secrets.rs. get_secret: always display '[encrypted]' with key name only — remove current first-4/last-4 partial unmask. Add SecretsAction::Migrate: reads env vars ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, OPENROUTER_API_KEY, HEX_HUB_SECRET — for each present, calls POST /api/secrets/vault, prints confirmation. Add SecretsAction::Export: requires --confirm flag, calls list endpoint returning masked entries, prints table. Update status() to warn if vault entries exist but ~/.hex/vault.key is missing. Done when: cargo check -p hex-cli passes, migrate stores multiple keys, export requires --confirm.

tasks.name: Frontier providers: anthropic/openai/gemini as first-class types with --key-ref and --fallback flags
tasks.description: Update hex-cli/src/commands/inference.rs. Rename --key flag to --key-ref (update InferenceAction::Add). Validate key_ref starts with 'env:' or 'vault:' — error otherwise. Add --fallback <provider_id> flag (repeatable). Add anthropic, openai, gemini to provider_type match: anthropic base_url=https://api.anthropic.com/v1 default key_ref=env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; openai base_url=https://api.openai.com/v1 default key_ref=env:OPENAI_API_KEY; gemini base_url=https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta default key_ref=env:GEMINI_API_KEY. Connectivity check per provider type. Register with nexus using key_ref not raw value. Include fallback_provider_ids in body. Done when: hex inference add anthropic registers, appears in list.

tasks.name: Provider fallback chains: retry on 429/timeout/5xx in hex-nexus inference routing
tasks.description: Extend inference provider record with fallback_provider_ids: Vec<String> (stored as JSON in SQLite/SpacetimeDB). In hex-nexus inference request forwarding: if response is 429, connect timeout, or 5xx — iterate fallback_provider_ids in order, retry with each until success or exhausted. Log each fallback attempt to HexFlo memory: key 'inference:fallback:{timestamp}', value '{primary}->{fallback}: {reason}'. Return first successful response. If all fail, return last error with header X-Hex-Fallback-Exhausted: true. Done when: unit test stubs primary to return 429, fallback provider called and response returned.

tasks.name: Model aliases: ~/.hex/models.toml with defaults, resolution before provider lookup
tasks.description: Create hex-nexus/src/model_aliases.rs: load ~/.hex/models.toml (create with defaults on first use: sonnet='claude-sonnet-4-6', opus='claude-opus-4-6', haiku='claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', gpt4o='gpt-4o', gemini='gemini-2.0-flash'). Expose resolve_alias(model: &str) -> &str — returns full ID if alias found, else input unchanged. In hex-nexus inference routing, call resolve_alias before forwarding. Add InferenceAction::Aliases subcommand in CLI: list, set <alias> <model-id>, remove <alias>. Done when: 'sonnet' resolves to 'claude-sonnet-4-6' in routing, hex inference aliases list works.

tasks.name: Integration tests: vault security, inference schema, fallback, aliases, migration end-to-end
tasks.description: Write integration tests in hex-nexus/tests/. Required: (1) vault round-trip: vault_set then vault_get returns same value decrypted; (2) claim single-use: valid HMAC returns value, second claim returns 409; (3) inference raw key rejected: POST /api/inference/register with secret_key='sk-raw' returns 400; (4) inference key_ref accepted: 'env:OPENAI_API_KEY' stores correctly; (5) fallback on 429: mock primary returning 429, verify fallback called; (6) alias resolution: model='sonnet' forwarded as 'claude-sonnet-4-6'. CLI smoke: hex secrets migrate with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in env. Run hex analyze . and verify clean output. Done when all tests pass and hex analyze reports no violations.
